title: Feature Comparison Table

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Compare Features of Different Products
description: Create a responsive table that compares different features of two or more products.
requirements
1. The table should have a clear and concise header with feature names.
2. The table should have a responsive design that adapts to different screen sizes.
3. Each product should have its own row in the table with feature names and descriptions.
4. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

constraints: Use only HTML and CSS to solve this challenge
No external libraries or frameworks except Tailwind CSS
The table should be responsive and adapt to different screen sizes
